creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #1)

It is explained in  comment #0

Poudriere was reporting duplicated files.

The docs are added automatically to the plist thanks to "DOCS_VARS= PORTDOCS=*" which adds everything in DOCSDIR automatically:

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#install-documentation
